notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Nick Gonzales out at 2nd. Bryan Reynolds out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Rafael Devers. Marcell Ozuna out at 2nd. Oneil Cruz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe grounds out to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Oneil Cruz scores. Konnor Griffin to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe flies out to shortstop Willy Adames.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Rafael Devers.
